proposal_summary: A proposal to fund volky.eth $18k streamed over 3 months to revamp nouns.wtf and dev tooling, retroactive compensation of 1 Noun for past work, and $2k to seed a bounty program managed by a 2/3 multisig.

disclosed_entities.name: Bounty Multisig
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Funds will be kept in a 2/3 multisig with volky.eth + DUNA admins

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds development work for nouns.wtf and dev tooling.
Rewards volky.eth for past work done on prop 773.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: 1 Noun as retro comp for the work already done

claimed_actions.raw_action: Set aside $2k for community contribution bounties
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Funds a 2/3 multisig to pay out bounties to developers.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: I'm asking for $2k to seed a bounty program Funds will be kept in a 2/3 multisig

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal consists of standard treasury transfers (streaming USDC/ETH, sending an NFT, and funding a multisig) without complex protocol upgrades.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Stream volky.eth $18k over 3 months... Retro-comp volky with 1 Noun... Set aside $2k

limitations: No explicit smart contract interaction payload or specific currency for the $18k and $2k is mentioned (assumed to be USDC or ETH).
The streaming mechanism (e.g., Sablier) is not explicitly detailed.
